Demo · Next.js + TypeScript + Tailwind

Build apps in a browser tab - with an AI pair on call.

Codeweave is an AI-native IDE. Editor, file tree, terminal, AI chat, and isolated branch runs - all in one workspace.

Open the editor See projects

Live workspaces

Avg ship time

codeweave/checkout-redesign

app/

page.tsx

layout.tsx

components/

cart.tsx

checkout.tsx

lib/

cart-store.ts

// app/page.tsx

import Cart from "@/components/cart";

export default function HomePage() {

return <Cart />;

}

Codeweave AI

Add a promo-code input below the cart total. Persist the applied code.

Everything in one workspace

No setup. No context switching. Pick a template, prompt, ship.

Real file tree

Browse and edit real source files. Not just chat, not just snippets.

Built-in terminal

Run scripts, install packages, restart dev servers - without leaving the tab.

AI pair, in context

Chat sees your files, your recent diffs, and your terminal output.

Branch-isolated runs

Each AI run lives on its own branch. Review the diff before merging.

Prompts that ship code

Each prompt opens a branch, runs in an isolated container, produces a real diff, and tells you what changed. Approve and merge - or roll back in one click.

Diff-first review, not blind apply

Multi-file edits with dependency awareness

Replay any prompt on a fresh branch

Open the editor

→ ai/promo-code · run-241

+ app/components/promo-code.tsx

+ lib/promo-store.ts

~ lib/cart-store.ts

~ app/page.tsx

4 files changed, 84 lines · 1m 12s

tests passready to merge

Spin up a workspace

10 seconds from prompt to running app.

An AI-native IDE in your browser. Build, run, and ship from a single tab.
